---
title: "Constance Margaret Prevost"
---

## Constance Margaret Prevost

**Dates:** (1858/9- after 1952)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1887-94)

### Biography

Second daughter of Sir Charles Prevost, 3rd Bt. (1831-1902) and Sarah Margaret Keble (d.1919), daughter of the Rev. Thomas Keble, sr. and niece of the Rev. John Keble.
She published <i>Terra Cotta Plays</i> (London, Walter Smith 1888), as well as a later play and two later volumes of verse.

### Letters

- Letter from July 3d [1888]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
